name: rubot
description: Strict multi-agent orchestration governor with 33 workflow commands, 8 hooks, 16 specialist subagents, and 44 domain skills for full-stack TanStack Start development with comprehensive OWASP ASVS 5.0.0 security auditing
longDescription:
Rubot enforces deterministic, mandatory multi-agent consultation for all significant tasks in complex Claude Code projects. It acts as a project manager ensuring no decision is made without consensus from all relevant domain experts.

Features:
- 16 specialist subagents covering backend, frontend, database, deployment, testing, SEO, and more
- 33 workflow commands including 7 SEO commands, 5 setup commands, testing/QA, WCAG accessibility, responsive audit, global layout, multilanguage, security scanning, OWASP security audit, and full git/PR workflow
- 8 lifecycle hooks including 3 SEO hooks (meta-check, image-check, build-check)
- 44 domain-specific skills including 18 OWASP ASVS 5.0.0 security skills (covering all 17 chapters plus master audit orchestration), 5 SEO skills, responsive design system, global layout, multilanguage i18n, WCAG accessibility (audit + fix), react-grab element inspection, agent-browser CLI reference, and CF Workers setup
- Comprehensive OWASP ASVS 5.0.0 security auditing with ~350 verification requirements across 17 chapters at 3 assurance levels (L1/L2/L3)
- ClawSec Suite integration for security advisory monitoring, skill integrity verification, and guarded install checks
- Frontend ownership model with shadcn-ui-designer as team lead
- Mandatory registry enforcement for 20 shadcn-compatible registries
- agent-browser CLI integration for live browser automation and E2E testing
